name: Fried Diamond Twists: Fattigmanns Bakkels
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sifted Pillsbury's Best All Purpose Flour
1/4 teaspoon French's Cinnamon, Cardamom, or Nutmeg (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. FRY at 350 degrees for about 2 minutes.
2. Blend together the butter, cream, sugar, salt, and egg yolks until well blended.
3. Gradually add 2 to 2 1/4 cups flour to form a stiff dough. If desired, add cinnamon, cardamom, nutmeg, or grated lemon rind and blend thoroughly.
4. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to 1/16-inch thickness. Chill remaining dough until ready to use.
5. Cut strips about 1 1/2 inches wide with a pastry wheel or sharp knife.
6. Cut diagonally at 4-inch intervals.
7. Make a 2-inch slit lengthwise in the center of each piece.
8. Fry in hot deep fat (350 degrees) until delicately browned, about 1 minute on each side.
9. Drain on absorbent paper.
10. Sprinkle with sifted confectioners' sugar.
For use with Pillsbury's Best Self-Rising Flour, omit salt.
